questions.question: What happened to the young man Eutychus during Paul's long sermon in Troas?
options: He fell from a window and died, but Paul raised him
questions.answer: He fell from a window and died, but Paul raised him

questions.question: In his farewell speech to the Ephesian elders, what did Paul warn would come after he left?
Paul said he had not hesitated to preach anything that would be helpful to the Ephesians.
It is more _____ to give than to receive.
Paul said, 'I don't consider my life of any account as dear to myself, so that I may finish my _____ with joy.'
